Project.NAME: @osovv/vv-opencode
Project.annotation: Portable OpenCode workflow package with plugins and a Bun CLI for install, sync, and cross-device setup.

M-CLI-CONFIG.NAME: OpenCodeConfigTools
M-CLI-CONFIG.purpose: Path resolution, JSONC-aware config mutation, pinned plugin registration, provider baseURL patching, managed OpenCode agent registration/model overrides, managed agent prompt scaffolding, managed Guardian config rendering, and installation inspection with separated vvoc roots.

fn-resolvePaths.PURPOSE: Resolve OpenCode config paths and vvoc-managed config paths for the selected scope.

fn-ensurePackageInstalled.PURPOSE: Add the pinned vvoc package specifier to the OpenCode plugin array if needed.

fn-writeProviderBaseUrl.PURPOSE: Write or preserve an OpenCode provider options.baseURL override conservatively.

fn-writeOpenCodeAgentModel.PURPOSE: Write or remove a model override for a built-in OpenCode agent such as general or explore.

fn-syncManagedAgentRegistrations.PURPOSE: Ensure OpenCode config contains vvoc-managed OpenCode agent registrations such as the primary enhancer agent and the bundled subagents.

fn-syncGuardianConfig.PURPOSE: Rewrite managed Guardian config while preserving current values.

M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.NAME: ManagedAgents
M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.purpose: Define bundled guardian/memory-reviewer/enhancer/implementer/spec-reviewer/code-reviewer/investitagor prompt templates and managed primary/subagent metadata.

const-MANAGED_OPENCODE_AGENTS.PURPOSE: Canonical managed OpenCode agent definitions used for enhancer/subagent registration.

fn-loadManagedAgentPromptTemplate.PURPOSE: Load a bundled prompt template for a managed vvoc agent.

M-CLI-COMMANDS.NAME: VVOCCommands
M-CLI-COMMANDS.purpose: Compose the `vvoc` CLI and expose init, sync, status, doctor, version, plugin list, config validate, agent, path-provider, completion, and upgrade commands, including model overrides for built-in general/explore plus registration of vvoc-managed OpenCode agents.

export-init.PURPOSE: Bootstrap package registration and config scaffolding (interactive by default).

M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.NAME: GuardianPlugin
M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.purpose: Review OpenCode permission requests using a constrained hidden Guardian subagent and safe fallback behavior.

export-GuardianPlugin.PURPOSE: Register Guardian hooks for config, events, tool intent capture, and permission review via a hidden subagent.

M-PLUGIN-MEMORY-STORE.NAME: MemoryStore
M-PLUGIN-MEMORY-STORE.purpose: Store explicit memory under the vvoc XDG data root, keep shared scope global across projects, resolve scopes, and provide lexical ranking for search.

fn-loadMemoryRuntimeConfig.PURPOSE: Load global and project vvoc memory settings.

fn-putMemory.PURPOSE: Create a scoped memory entry in the vvoc XDG data root.

fn-searchMemories.PURPOSE: Return ranked lexical matches across scoped entries.

M-PLUGIN-MEMORY.NAME: MemoryPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MEMORY.purpose: Add explicit memory tools to OpenCode and register the `memory-reviewer` subagent.

export-MemoryPlugin.PURPOSE: Register memory tools and the report-only reviewer subagent.

M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.NAME: SystemContextInjectionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.purpose: Inject reusable system guidance into primary chat sessions while skipping known subagents so main-session behavior can be steered globally.

export-SystemContextInjectionPlugin.PURPOSE: Inject main-session system guidance such as proactive explore instructions without polluting known subagents.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-SESS.NAME: PlaceholderSession
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-SESS.purpose: Manages secret-to-placeholder mappings with HMAC-SHA256 hashing, TTL eviction, and max-mappings limits.

class-PlaceholderSession.PURPOSE: Manages placeholder lifecycle — creation, lookup, TTL cleanup.

fn-getPlaceholderRegex.PURPOSE: Returns RegExp to find all placeholders in text.

fn-generateFallbackSecret.PURPOSE: Generates random hex secret when VVOC_SECRET is not set.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-PATT.NAME: PatternSet
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-PATT.purpose: Builds pattern set from config — keywords, regex rules, and 13 builtin patterns (email, uuid, ipv4, mac, openai_key, anthropic_key, github_token, aws_access_key, stripe_key, bearer_token, bearer_dot, syn_key, hex_token).

fn-buildPatternSet.PURPOSE: Builds pattern set from config with regex normalization.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-ENGI.NAME: RedactEngine
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-ENGI.purpose: Core redaction engine — performs find/replace of secrets with placeholders using right-to-left interval arithmetic.

fn-redactText.PURPOSE: Replaces secrets in text with placeholders, returns changed text + match list.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-REST.NAME: RestoreEngine
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-REST.purpose: Restores placeholders in a single string back to original secret values.

fn-restoreText.PURPOSE: Restores all placeholders in a string to original values.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-DEEP.NAME: DeepTraversal
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-DEEP.purpose: Deep traversal helpers for restoring/redacting placeholders in nested objects and arrays with cycle safety.

fn-restoreDeep.PURPOSE: In-place restoration of placeholders in objects/arrays.

fn-redactDeep.PURPOSE: In-place redaction of secrets in objects/arrays.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-CONF.NAME: ConfigLoader
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION-INTERNAL-CONF.purpose: Loads secrets-redaction.config.json from XDG config paths with environment variable substitution.

fn-loadConfig.PURPOSE: Loads and returns normalized config with warnings.

fn-getConfigCandidates.PURPOSE: Returns ordered candidate paths for config file.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.NAME: SecretsRedactionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.purpose: Redacts secrets from messages before LLM requests and restores them after — protects secrets from being sent to LLM providers.

export-SecretsRedactionPlugin.PURPOSE: Main plugin factory — hooks into experimental.chat.messages.transform, experimental.text.complete, tool.execute.before.

M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.NAME: ConfigValidate
M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.purpose: Validate guardian.jsonc and memory.jsonc with human-readable error reporting.

fn-validateGuardianConfigContent.PURPOSE: Validate guardian.jsonc content and report schema violations with line/col.

fn-validateMemoryConfigContent.PURPOSE: Validate memory.jsonc content and report schema violations with line/col.

fn-validateGuardianConfigFile.PURPOSE: Validate guardian.jsonc file and report schema violations.

fn-validateMemoryConfigFile.PURPOSE: Validate memory.jsonc file and report schema violations.

cmd-config_validate.PURPOSE: vvoc config validate - CLI command for config validation.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.NAME: PluginList
M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.purpose: Display all installed OpenCode plugins with enabled/disabled status and source paths.

fn-listPlugins.PURPOSE: Scan OpenCode config and return plugin entries.

fn-parsePluginSpecifier.PURPOSE: Parse plugin specifier string into name/source/enabled.

fn-renderPluginTable.PURPOSE: Render plugin list as aligned Name/Source/Status table.

cmd-plugin_list.PURPOSE: vvoc plugin list - CLI command for listing plugins.

M-CLI-PATH-PROVIDER.NAME: PathProvider
M-CLI-PATH-PROVIDER.purpose: Apply global OpenCode provider endpoint patch presets such as the `stepfun-ai` baseURL override.

fn-resolvePathProviderPreset.PURPOSE: Validate supported provider patch preset names and map them to concrete provider/baseURL writes.

fn-applyPathProviderPreset.PURPOSE: Resolve the global OpenCode config path and apply the selected provider preset.

cmd-path_provider.PURPOSE: vvoc path-provider stepfun-ai - CLI command for the global StepFun endpoint patch.

M-CLI-COMPLETION.NAME: Completion
M-CLI-COMPLETION.purpose: Auto-detect the current shell, install completion files idempotently, and generate bash/zsh/fish completion content including path-provider presets and the `agent set|unset ` flow.

fn-detectShell.PURPOSE: Detect the active shell from environment variables.

M-CLI-INIT.NAME: Init
M-CLI-INIT.purpose: Interactive project setup with prompts for scope, plugins, and initial configuration. Uses @clack/prompts. Interactive mode is default; --non-interactive enables batch mode.

fn-runInit.PURPOSE: Run interactive initialization using @clack/prompts. Interactive by default, --non-interactive for batch.

cmd-init.PURPOSE: vvoc init - CLI command for project initialization.

M-CLI-UPGRADE.NAME: Upgrade
M-CLI-UPGRADE.purpose: Check npm for updates and offer upgrade with changelog display.

fn-fetchLatestVersion.PURPOSE: Query npm registry for latest @osovv/vv-opencode version.

fn-printUpgradeStatus.PURPOSE: Print up-to-date or upgrade available message.

cmd-upgrade.PURPOSE: vvoc upgrade - CLI command for checking/upgrading vvoc.
